baseline: Within-experiment: 5tier_baseline mode (wc_10_enabled=false) on the same 8 dates. Cross-experiment: experiments/2026-05-03-008-opus47-cross-period/ provides 8/8 dates of NVDA Q4 2025 ratings under Opus 4.7 (this experiment uses Sonnet 4.6, so cross-experiment comparison is approximate; within-experiment paired comparison is the load-bearing measurement).
notes: v3 bear-regime test: 8 dates × 1 ticker (NVDA) × 2 modes = 16 propagates × ~$0.40 = ~$6.40 LLM (T1, ≤$10). Predicts ALT-A per v1's WC-10 caveat: WC-10 will commit MORE bullishly on Q4 2025 NVDA, amplifying framework's anti-calibrated direction → WORSE realized α than 5-tier. Confirmation strengthens Constitution VII v1.5.0's regime-asymmetry caveat.
